title: Ashen + Visuality Support
description: A small, 16x pack adding compatibility between Ashen 16x and Visuality
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

Want to play Ashen with [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)? Tired of particles like bones using vanilla textures and looking out of place with Ashen? Then this Add-On is for you!

For Slime Blobs, I recommend setting "Slime Blobs Color" to *#68822a* to match Ashen's Slime palette.

Place this pack *above* Ashen in your load order.
___

This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen/) and [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality).
___
